lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਧਰਤੀ ਬੀਜੁ ਸਬਦੋ ਕਰਿ ਸਚ ਕੀ ਆਬ ਨਿਤ ਦੇਹਿ ਪਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: amal kar dharatee beej sabado kar sach kee aab nit dehi paanee |
lines.english: Make good deeds the soil, and let the Word of the Shabad be the seed; irrigate it continually with the water of Truth.
Do not think that your Husband Lord can be obtained by mere words.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਕਿਰਸਾਣੁ ਈਮਾਨੁ ਜੰਮਾਇ ਲੈ ਭਿਸਤੁ ਦੋਜਕੁ ਮੂੜੇ ਏਵ ਜਾਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hoe kirasaan eemaan jamaae lai bhisat dojak moorre ev jaanee |1|
lines.english: Become such a farmer, and faith will sprout. This brings knowledge of heaven and hell, you fool! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਲ ਕੈ ਮਾਣੈ ਰੂਪ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਇਤੁ ਬਿਧੀ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maal kai maanai roop kee sobhaa it bidhee janam gavaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are wasting this life in the pride of wealth and the splendor of beauty. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਬ ਤਨਿ ਚਿਕੜੋ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮੀਡਕੋ ਕਮਲ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨਹੀ ਮੂਲਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aib tan chikarro ihu man meeddako kamal kee saar nahee mool paaee |
lines.english: The defect of the body which leads to sin is the mud puddle, and this mind is the frog, which does not appreciate the lotus flower at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉਰੁ ਉਸਤਾਦੁ ਨਿਤ ਭਾਖਿਆ ਬੋਲੇ ਕਿਉ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਾ ਨਹ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhaur usataad nit bhaakhiaa bole kiau boojhai jaa neh bujhaaee |2|
lines.english: The bumble bee is the teacher who continually teaches the lesson. But how can one understand, unless one is made to understand? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣੁ ਸੁਨਣਾ ਪਉਣ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan sunanaa paun kee baanee ihu man rataa maaeaa |
lines.english: This speaking and listening is like the song of the wind, for those whose minds are colored by the love of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮ ਕੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਦਿਲਹਿ ਪਸਿੰਦੇ ਜਿਨੀ ਕਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khasam kee nadar dileh pasinde jinee kar ek dhiaaeaa |3|
lines.english: The Grace of the Master is bestowed upon those who meditate on Him alone. They are pleasing to His Heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖੈ ਰਾਹਿ ਪੈ ਚਲਣਾ ਮਾਲੁ ਧਨੁ ਕਿਤ ਕੂ ਸੰਜਿਆਹੀ ॥੪॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak aakhai raeh pai chalanaa maal dhan kit koo sanjiaahee |4|27|
lines.english: Says Nanak, you will have to walk on the Path of Death, so why do you bother to collect wealth and property? ||4||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਹ ਕਰਿ ਰਖੇ ਪੰਜ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਥੀ ਨਾਉ ਸੈਤਾਨੁ ਮਤੁ ਕਟਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: teeh kar rakhe panj kar saathee naau saitaan mat katt jaaee |
lines.english: You may observe the thirty fasts, and say the five prayers each day, but 'Satan' can undo them.
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਮਉਲਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਗੁ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਹਰਿਆ ਕੀਆ ਸੰਸਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: soee maulaa jin jag mauliaa hariaa keea sansaaro |
lines.english: He is the Master who has made the world bloom; He makes the Universe blossom forth, fresh and green.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਬ ਖਾਕੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਬੰਧਿ ਰਹਾਈ ਧੰਨੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aab khaak jin bandh rahaaee dhan sirajanahaaro |1|
lines.english: He holds the water and the land in bondage. Hail to the Creator Lord! ||1||
Death, O Mullah-death will come,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੂ ਮੁਲਾ ਤਾ ਤੂ ਕਾਜੀ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਖੁਦਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa too mulaa taa too kaajee jaaneh naam khudaaee |
lines.english: You are a Mullah, and you are a Qazi, only when you know the Naam, the Name of God.
so live in the Fear of God the Creator. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਬਹੁਤੇਰਾ ਪੜਿਆ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਕੋ ਰਹੈ ਨ ਭਰੀਐ ਪਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: je bahuteraa parriaa hoveh ko rahai na bhareeai paaee |2|
lines.english: You may be very educated, but no one can remain when the measure of life is full. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਕਾਜੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਆਪੁ ਤਜਿਆ ਇਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਕੀਆ ਆਧਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: soee kaajee jin aap tajiaa ik naam keea aadhaaro |
lines.english: He alone is a Qazi, who renounces selfishness and conceit, and makes the One Name his Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਭੀ ਹੋਸੀ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਜਾਸੀ ਸਚਾ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: hai bhee hosee jaae na jaasee sachaa sirajanahaaro |3|
lines.english: The True Creator Lord is, and shall always be. He was not born; He shall not die. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਜ ਵਖਤ ਨਿਵਾਜ ਗੁਜਾਰਹਿ ਪੜਹਿ ਕਤੇਬ ਕੁਰਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: panj vakhat nivaaj gujaareh parreh kateb kuraanaa |
lines.english: You may chant your prayers five times each day; you may read the Bible and the Koran.
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖੈ ਗੋਰ ਸਦੇਈ ਰਹਿਓ ਪੀਣਾ ਖਾਣਾ ॥੪॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak aakhai gor sadeee rahio peenaa khaanaa |4|28|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the grave is calling you, and now your food and drink are finished. ||4||28||
Falsehood is my dagger; through deception, I eat the carcasses of the dead.
The dogs of greed are with me.
I live as a wild hunter, O Creator! ||1||
In the early morning, they continually bark at the wind.
I am deformed and horribly disfigured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਪਤਿ ਕੀ ਪੰਦਿ ਨ ਕਰਣੀ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: mai pat kee pand na karanee kee kaar |
lines.english: I have not followed good advice, nor have I done good deeds.
Your Name alone, Lord, saves the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਏਹਾ ਆਸ ਏਹੋ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mai ehaa aas eho aadhaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This is my hope; this is my support. ||1||Pause||
With my mouth I speak slander, day and night.
I spy on the houses of others-I am such a wretched low-life!
Unfulfilled sexual desire and unresolved anger dwell in my body, like the outcasts who cremate the dead.
I live as a wild hunter, O Creator! ||2||
I make plans to trap others, although I appear gentle.
I am a robber-I rob the world.
I have not appreciated what You have done for me, Lord; I take from others and exploit them.
I am very clever-I carry loads of sin.
I live as a wild hunter, O Creator! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਦੇਸਾ ਦੁਸਟੁ ਚੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau kiaa muhu desaa dusatt chor |
lines.english: What face shall I show You, Lord? I am a sneak and a thief.
I live as a wild hunter, O Creator! ||4||29||
Nanak describes the state of the lowly.
There is one awareness among all created beings.
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:
None have been created without this awareness.
